## Type of Change
<!-- Please check all options that apply. -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Template addition (adding a new service template)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

- [ ] Refactor (code cleanup, performance improvements, etc.)

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated to cover changes
- [ ] Documentation updated if required
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `golangci-lint` passes locally
- [ ] No layer violations (e.g., core logic does not depend on adapter implementation)
- [ ] Specification updated if core architectural changes made
